name: Living Neural Organoid Mesh
blurb: Biotech-grown neurons fuse with self-assembling substrates to form implantable living brain tissue.

name: Neuro-Actuated Robotic Cortex
blurb: Robots grow on-demand neural substrates that directly translate intent into motor commands.

name: Neural Substrate Mind Interface
blurb: Self-wired neural tissue worn at the scalp streams brain activity directly into virtual environments.

name: Adaptive Graphene Architecture Compiler
blurb: AI directs nanobot swarms to rebuild graphene scaffolds in real time based on structural load feedback.

name: Quantum-Optimized Lattice Fabricator
blurb: Quantum algorithms compute atom-perfect graphene assembly paths that classical planners cannot resolve.

name: Virtual Material Proving Ground
blurb: Engineers stress-test graphene nanobot scaffold designs inside VR before nanobots commit to physical assembly.

name: Adaptive Sensation Calibration Engine
blurb: AI continuously tunes nanofilm haptic output to match each user's unique sensory thresholds in real time.

name: Quantum-Encoded Tactile Bandwidth
blurb: Quantum channels carry nanofilm sensation data at latencies imperceptible to human touch receptors.

name: Graphene Sensory Nanofilm Array
blurb: Graphene's conductivity lets the nanofilm resolve sub-millimetre texture and temperature simultaneously.

name: Cognitive Swarm Directive Layer
blurb: AI generates high-level goals that dissolve into nanobot swarm instructions without explicit programming.

name: Quantum Swarm Trajectory Planner
blurb: Quantum optimizers solve collision-free paths for billions of nanobots simultaneously in microseconds.

name: Swarm-Rendered Physical Environment
blurb: Nanobot fleets rearrange matter in a room to match objects a user is touching inside VR.

name: Coherence-Aware Neural Accelerator
blurb: AI schedules workloads across qubit arrays to exploit coherence windows before decoherence degrades fidelity.

name: Qubit-Lattice Reflex Controller
blurb: Nanostructured qubit arrays solve robot inverse kinematics in real time far below classical latency floors.

name: Quantum-Coherent Scene Renderer
blurb: Qubit lattice arrays compute photorealistic VR lighting simulations including wave-optic diffraction effects.

name: Coherence-Preserving Transfer Optimizer
blurb: AI schedules nanoconstruct ferry routes to minimize decoherence across variable-fidelity quantum channels.

name: Entanglement-Sustained Particle Relay
blurb: Quantum processors entangle ferry nanoconstructs in sequence, extending coherent transfer range indefinitely.

name: Graphene Coherence Waveguide Relay
blurb: Graphene channels sustain quantum-coherent nanoconstruct transit across room-temperature macroscopic distances.

name: Autonomous Intracellular Drug Foundry
blurb: AI orchestrates programmable nanomachines to synthesise patient-specific therapeutics inside target cells in situ.

name: Surgical Nanoforge Delivery Arm
blurb: Robotic manipulators position nanoforges at sub-millimetre surgical sites for localised intracellular synthesis.

name: Virtual Nanoforge Rehearsal Suite
blurb: Surgeons rehearse nanoforge deployment inside a VR cell atlas before any patient exposure.

name: Nanoscale Neuromorphic Inference Chip
blurb: Nanotechnology fabricates graphene synapse layers at atomic precision for ultra-dense on-chip AI inference.

name: Quantum-Boosted Graphene Inference
blurb: Quantum co-processors accelerate stochastic layers in graphene neuromorphic chips beyond classical throughput limits.

name: Neuromorphic VR World Engine
blurb: Graphene inference chips power physics-accurate AI-driven VR worlds at orders-of-magnitude lower energy cost.

name: Nano-Embedded Haptic Narrator
blurb: Nanosensors embedded in environment feed real-time physical data to an AI that narrates VR events with tactile accuracy.

name: Quantum-Coherent Narrative Simulator
blurb: Quantum processors let the embodied narrator branch narrative timelines and resolve causality conflicts in real time.

name: Graphene Display Narrative Engine
blurb: Flexible graphene screens wrap physical spaces while an AI narrator stitches coherent VR stories across their surfaces.

name: Molecular-Scale Dexterous Manipulator

name: Quantum-Planned Embodied Agent

name: Embodied Robot VR Co-Pilot
blurb: Human operator inhabits robot perception in VR and overrides embodied AI decisions in safety-critical moments.

name: Nanostructured Quantum Inference Fabric

name: Quantum-Accelerated Robot Perception
blurb: Robots run scene-understanding inference on quantum co-processors, resolving ambiguous sensor data in microseconds.

name: Quantum-Rendered Adaptive VR Engine
blurb: Quantum inference cores predict user attention to pre-render only the VR regions eyes will next focus on.

name: Nano-Relay Entanglement Backbone

name: Distributed Quantum Memory Fabric

name: Graphene Entanglement Routing Plane
blurb: Graphene interconnects carry entangled photons between AI-coordinated quantum state transfer nodes with minimal loss.

name: Nanoparticle Protein Delivery Compiler

name: Robotic Precision Protein Synthesiser

name: Protein Structure VR Design Studio

name: Affective Touch Inference Layer
